writing.notes: Short session. Couldn't get into it until 8:30 and Theo woke up early so the walk ran long. 410 words is still 410 words.
writing.concern: I'm worried I'm confusing discipline with mere consistency. There's a difference and the book needs to honor it. Cato is the example, not the stopwatch.

bookstore.notes: The Scribd / banned books partnership is confirmed for the 17th and 19th. Pulling together the titles we want to give away — Kite Runner, New Kid, George. This feels right. This is what the store should be doing.
bookstore.financial: February P&L looks like we'll be down ~15% from January. Not panicking but watching it.

family.notes: Valentine's Day. Samantha and I had dinner after the boys were asleep. She asked how the book is going. I told her the truth: I don't know yet. She said that sounds about right for this point. She's good at that.

daily_stoic_newsletter: Sent. Valentine's Day edition on Stoic love. Marcus on Faustina.
reading: Started Lives of the Stoics research notes — revisiting material from that book to see if any of it illuminates Discipline differently.
blockers: Energy lower this week — not sleeping great
